892 SHWR_INTRM_CD SHWR_INTRM_CD GG0130E5 Shower/bathe self (Interim Perf) CHAR 2 Indicates the resident's ability to bathe self, including washing, rinsing, and drying self (excludes washing of back and hair) (excludes transferring in/out of tub/shower) during the assessment period plus two previous calendar days. 06=Independent 
05=Setup or clean-up assistance 
04=Supervision or touching assistance
